llm_provider.title: LLM Provider Configuration
llm_provider.description: Choose your Large Language Model provider for reasoning and generation.

embedding_provider.title: Embedding Provider Configuration
embedding_provider.description: Choose how to generate vector embeddings for your documents.

vector_db.title: Vector Database Configuration
vector_db.description: Configure the vector database for storing and searching embeddings.

storage.title: Document Storage Configuration
storage.description: Set the path where uploaded documents will be stored.

test_connections.title: Testing Connections
test_connections.description: Verifying configuration and testing all connections...

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the specified service. Please check host/port.
error.invalid_path: The storage path is not accessible or writable.
error.llm_connection_failed: Failed to connect to LLM provider.
error.embedding_connection_failed: Failed to connect to embedding provider.
error.vector_db_connection_failed: Failed to connect to vector database.

upload_document.name: Upload Document
upload_document.description: Upload and index a document into the RAG system.

file_path.name: File Path
file_path.description: Absolute path to the document file to upload.

collection.name: Collection
collection.description: Target collection name (optional, uses default if not set).

metadata.name: Metadata
metadata.description: Additional metadata to store with the document (optional).

search.name: Search Documents
search.description: Search for documents similar to the given query.

reason.name: Reason over Documents
reason.description: Ask a question and get an LLM-reasoned answer based on indexed documents.

query.name: Question
query.description: The question to answer using the document knowledge base.

top_k.name: Context Documents
top_k.description: Number of context documents to retrieve.

delete_document.name: Delete Document
delete_document.description: Delete a document from the RAG system.

document_id.name: Document ID
document_id.description: The unique identifier of the document to delete.
